---
name: Feedback
about: Suggest changes to user stories, data layers, tasks, or tags
title: "Feedback: "
labels: feedback
---

## What do you want to change?
<!-- Pick one or more: User Story / Data Layer / Task / Tag / Other -->


## Which persona or data layer is this about?
<!-- e.g. Crop Protection, Disease Incidences, etc. -->


## Describe the change
<!-- Be specific: what should be added, removed, or edited? -->


## Why?
<!-- Context helps — e.g. "came up in a client call", "this data layer doesn't apply here" -->
